changeReason: English translation was missing; ENG field contained untranslated Japanese text.

TextENGNew: Following Rika-chan's lead, we arrived at... the Furude Shrine, where we had just held the luncheon earlier.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...This is the place, Keiichi. Thank you so much for carrying everything.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Wait, this is... a shrine?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: I said that while looking up at the torii gate atop the stone steps.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Actually... hold on. The name of this shrine is 'Furude Shrine.'
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: And Rika-chan's last name is...
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Oh, so this is where you live, Rika-chan.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``That's right. It took you this long to figure it out--you're quite the scatterbrain, Keiichi. Nipah~☆``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: She said that with a cheerful smile. ...Well, nobody else in the class had told me either.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``It wasn't a secret or anything. It's common knowledge in this village, so there was simply never an occasion to bring it up.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Common knowledge... this shrine?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Yes indeed. And, if I do say so myself, I am quite the celebrity in this village.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...Well, it is a small village, but now that I think about it, she really did seem like the idol of the elderly during our shopping trip earlier.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Heave-ho...``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Hm? That bicycle--``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: I noticed another bicycle parked right next to where Rika-chan was parking hers by the stone steps. I had only seen it once before, but I was pretty sure that color and model belonged to... Satoko.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Is Satoko here visiting?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Satoko lives with me. She's my adorable little housemate. Nipah~♪``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: She lives with... Then, Satoko's parents--
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Keiichi, thank you for all your hard work getting here. This is your reward. Here you go.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Hm? Oh, uh... thanks.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Rika-chan took the shopping bags from my hands, pulled out a single mandarin orange, and placed it in my palm. Then, flashing her usual bright smile and tilting her head adorably, she waved goodbye and headed up the stone steps.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``............Well, I guess that's fine.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: I still had things I wanted to ask, but I supposed I could ask anytime.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: With that thought, I kicked up the bicycle stand, swung my leg over the saddle, and pedaled back the way I came.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Dusk was almost upon us.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
